creator: craig001@lerwick.hopto.org
text:
OK... I have tracked the problem to an outdated
databases/evolution-data-server on my system (pkg_which identified this
as providing libcamel)

I successfully installed mail/evolution after updating the
evolution-data-server..

The problem is that evolution port nor portupgrade made no attempt to
install or upgrade the evolution-data-server is that normal ?

Kind Regards

Craig Butler
